vocab.database: Use Prisma ORM for type-safe queries. Define schema in schema.prisma, run `prisma migrate dev` to apply. For raw queries, use prisma.$queryRaw`SELECT ...`. Enable connection pooling with PgBouncer in production.
vocab.search: Use PostgreSQL's built-in full-text search with to_tsvector() and to_tsquery(). Create a GIN index on the tsvector column for performance. For typo-tolerant search, use pg_trgm extension with GIN index.
vocab.migrations: Use Prisma Migrate for schema changes. Each migration creates a timestamped SQL file in /prisma/migrations. Never edit migration files after applying — create a new migration instead.
vocab.performance: Add indexes for frequently-queried columns. Use EXPLAIN ANALYZE to diagnose slow queries. Use partial indexes for filtered queries. Avoid N+1 queries — use Prisma's include or select for related data.
vocab.json: Store flexible data in jsonb columns (not json — jsonb is indexed and faster). Query with -> operator for JSON object keys, ->> for text values. Index with GIN for full jsonb querying.
